examples: Objective: To determine the contents of the amino acids and study the characters of Pheretima aspergillum e.
OBJECTIVE a capillary electrophoresis with conductivity detection method to determine succinic acid in Pheretima aspergillum was described.
The purpose is to purify thrombolytic enzymes from Pheretima aspergillum(E. Perrier), and to analyze their activity and amino acid sequence.
